name: Chimichangas
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chopped or shredded cooked beef, pork or chicken
2 cans (4 oz. each) Chopped green chilies
1 to 2 teaspoons Chili powder or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, melt bacon grease over medium heat.
2. Saute meat, onion, garlic, tomatoes, chilies, and potatoes until the onion softens.
3. Add salt, oregano, chili powder, and cilantro; simmer 2-3 minutes.
4. Place a scant 1/2 cup of meat filling on each tortilla.
5. Fold, envelope-style, like a burrito.
6. Fry seam side down in 1/2 inch of hot oil (360-375 degrees) until crispy and brown.
7. Turn and brown the other side.
8. Drain briefly on a paper towel.
9. Place on a serving plate and top with shredded cheese, a dollop of sour cream, guacamole, salsa.
10. Place shredded lettuce next to chimichanga and top with tomatoes and olives.
11. Serve immediately.
